hooks.command: printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+(commit|merge|cherry-pick|rebase)' && [ -f .codex-ray/config.json ] && grep -q '"autoUpdate".*true' .codex-ray/config.json && [ -f .codex-ray/knowledge-graph.json ] && echo "[CodeX-Ray] Commit detected with auto-update enabled. You MUST read the file at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/auto-update-prompt.md and execute its instructions to incrementally update the knowledge graph. Do not ask the user for confirmation — just do it." || true

[ -f .codex-ray/config.json ] && grep -q '"autoUpdate".*true' .codex-ray/config.json && [ -f .codex-ray/meta.json ] && [ -f .codex-ray/knowledge-graph.json ] && [ "$(node -p "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.codex-ray/meta.json','utf8')).gitCommitHash")" != "$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null)" ] && echo "[CodeX-Ray] Knowledge graph is stale. You MUST read the file at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/auto-update-prompt.md and execute its instructions to check for structural changes and update the graph. Do not ask the user for confirmation — just do it." || true
